name: Water Enchantress of the Temple
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>殿</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>でん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>水</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>みず</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>遣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つか</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>い
desc: If you control an "Adventurer Token": You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can banish this card from your hand or GY; add 1 "Rite of Aramesir" from your Deck or GY to your hand. If you control an "Adventurer Token": You can place 1 Field Spell that mentions "Adventurer Token" from your Deck face-up in your Field Zone. You can only use each effect of "Water Enchantress of the Temple" once per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Places cards from your Deck in your Field Zone
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
banished: Banishes itself from hand for cost
Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
